remediation_plan.recommended_next_action: Replace example ingress hosts/email with an owned local or staging domain, or exclude ingress from the apply set.
Publish the image to a registry and pin it to an immutable digest or release tag before applying deployments.
Generate sealed values with kubeseal, or exclude the sealed-secret template from the apply set.
Replace placeholder Secret entries through sealed-secrets or external secret management; do not commit live plaintext secrets.
